name: How long till I get money after machine injury claim?
description: Weeks for first pay, months for settlement[4].

mainEntity.name: How long till I get money after machine injury claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Weeks for first pay, months for settlement[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **First check in 2-4 weeks; full settlement 6-18 months.** Depends on injury, disputes[4]. **Key factors:** Medical stability. **Practical guidance:** Advance pay possible; push insurer. Utah process via commission[1].
